2606.22557.title: MacAgentBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Real-World macOS Desktop
2606.22557.paper_summary: Computer use agents (CUAs) have advanced rapidly in desktop automation, and a growing number of users deploy CUAs such as OpenClaw on Mac Mini for always-on automation. However, existing benchmarks, including those for macOS, evaluate agents without framework augmentation and rely on binary evaluation. As a result, they fail to capture both the framework capabilities leveraged by modern CUAs and the partial progress on long-horizon, multi-application tasks. We present MacAgentBench, a comprehensive macOS agent benchmark comprising 676 tasks across 25 applications, with nearly 60% involving both GUI and CLI interaction. The benchmark adopts deterministic rule-based evaluation and introduces fine-grained multi-checkpoint scoring with capability annotations for multi-application tasks. Experiments across three frameworks and 16 models show that the best configuration, Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw, attains 73.7% Pass@1, while this advantage is primarily driven by the skill library rather than by framework design. Fine-grained metrics further reveal that models with similar Pass@1 can differ substantially in sub-goal completion. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench.
2606.22557.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理（CUAs）在桌面自動化方面迅速發展，越來越多的用戶在 Mac Mini 上部署 CUAs，如 OpenClaw，以實現持續運行的自動化。然後，現有的基準測試，包括針對 macOS 的測試，評估代理時並未進行框架增強，並依賴二元評估。因此，它們未能捕捉到現代 CUAs 利用的框架能力以及在長期、多應用任務上的部分進展。我們提出了 MacAgentBench，這是一個全面的 macOS 代理基準，包含 676 個任務，涵蓋 25 個應用程序，其中近 60% 涉及 GUI 和 CLI 交互。該基準採用確定性基於規則的評估，並引入了細粒度的多檢查點評分，並為多應用任務提供能力註釋。在三個框架和 16 個模型上的實驗顯示，最佳配置，即在 OpenClaw 上的 Claude Opus 4.6，達到了 73.7% 的 Pass@1，而這一優勢主要是由技能庫驅動，而非框架設計。細粒度指標進一步顯示，具有相似 Pass@1 的模型在子目標完成方面可能存在顯著差異。我們的代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench 上公開獲取。
2606.22557.author: Yikun Fu et.al.
2606.22557.authors: Yikun Fu, Bowen Fu, Zhenyu Wu, Shuang Cheng, Xiaowei Sun, Bowen Yang, Zehao Li, Yibo Zhao, Zichen Ding, Zhoumianze Liu, Shijie Wang, Biqing Qi, Bowen Zhou
